headline: Claude Code agentic frameworks and self-improving knowledge bases lead the day as evaluation techniques break out.
body: Claude Code dominates the window with competing production frameworks: Fable 5 Agentic OS adds modular memory and observability around the model, while separate guides push prompt phrasing and a /goal command for autonomous code generation through trajectory planning and self-correcting loops. A cluster of new entrants centers on self-improving knowledge bases that pair RAG, knowledge graphs, and automated ingestion with LLM-driven persistent memory and agent evaluation. Web scraping leads the movers on the argument that AI bots and autonomous browsing now intermediate most web traffic. On the model side, OpenRouter's Fusion API tested its parallel-inference Mixture of Experts approach against a single strong model and came up short.

cited_items.title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
